headline: Is CrowdStrike’s New Jet Partner App (CRWD) Quietly Rewiring Its AI Platform Expansion Strategy?
summary: Earlier this month, CrowdStrike launched Jet, a mobile app for partners on iOS and Android that centralizes real-time deal origination, tracking, support access, and instant cash-based rewards into a single interface. By compressing previously manual partner workflows into seconds and tying closed deals directly to digital wallet payouts, Jet could meaningfully change how quickly partners bring new business onto the Falcon platform. Next, we’ll examine how Jet’s streamlined partner...

headline: Stifel Just Crowned CrowdStrike With a $660 Price Target. The Bull Case Just Got Louder
summary: Stifel analyst Adam Borg raised the firm’s price target on CrowdStrike (NASDAQ:CRWD) to $660 from $480, maintaining a Buy rating ahead of the company’s fiscal Q1 2027 earnings report on June 3. The price target raise lands in the middle of a three-day analyst tug-of-war, sitting between KeyBanc’s aggressive bull call and DZ Bank’s notable ... headline: Is Cisco or CrowdStrike the Better Short Bet Right Now?
summary: Cisco Systems (NASDAQ: CSCO) and CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) delivered very different earnings stories. Cisco posted $15.84 billion in Q3 FY26 revenue, while CrowdStrike closed FY26 with $5.25 billion in ending annual recurring revenue (ARR). Both stocks have risen sharply, raising a harder question: which carries the weaker risk/reward from here? The Cisco Bear Case: Cost ... Is Cisco or CrowdStrike the Better Short Bet Right Now?

headline: CrowdStrike Named the Overall Champion in the Omdia 2026 Cybersecurity Platform Ecosystems Leadership Matrix
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, May 20, 2026--CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) today announced it has been named the Overall Champion in the Omdia 2026 Cybersecurity Platform Ecosystems Leadership Matrix, positioned highest and furthest to the right among 24 vendors. Reflecting analyst assessment, partner feedback, and performance metrics, the recognition underscores CrowdStrike’s leadership in building and scaling a global partner ecosystem on the CrowdStrike Falcon® platform.

Reflecting analyst assessment, partner feedback, and performance metrics, the recognition underscores CrowdStrike’s leadership in building and scaling a global partner ecosystem on the CrowdStrike Falcon® platform.

headline: CrowdStrike and SVA Partner to Power Next Phase of Cybersecurity Growth in Germany
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, & WIESBADEN, Germany, May 20, 2026--CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) and SVA System Vertrieb Alexander GmbH, one of Germany’s leading system integrators and IT service providers, today announced a strategic partnership to bring the AI-native CrowdStrike Falcon® platform to public sector, enterprise, and mid-market organizations across Germany. With this agreement, SVA is standardizing on CrowdStrike to help customers consolidate cybersecurity at scale and advance the company’s next phas
